## Meeting Purpose

[Review Strategy Sprint pipeline and discuss key deals and processes.](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [LightSource and Lovable are priority deals requiring immediate follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Alloy deal needs urgent attention; follow-up with CMO dropped](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Pricing strategy clarified: Start at $20K for sprints, $15K for execution](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Tyler to lead intro calls; Marcel involved for big logos/close connections](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

## Topics

### Deal Updates

  - [LightSource: Didn't sign by Friday; needs follow-up from Kyle/Jason with Ben](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Lovable: Wants Sept 2 kickoff; need to update SOW with prompt library in Phase 1](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Alloy: No recent communication; urgent follow-up needed with CMO](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Positron: Custom approach needed; pricing clarity required from Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)

### Pricing Strategy

  - [Default: $20K for strategy sprint, $15K for growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [Flexibility to increase sprint price to $30K-$40K for complex cases](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Rare to go below $12K for execution; difference between $15K and $12K unlikely to kill deals](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Consider starting higher (e.g., $30K) and offering a "discount" to $20K](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)

### Sales Process Improvements

  - [Need clear process for monitoring/responding to client questions post-signing, pre-kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [George to handle pre-kickoff queries (e.g., Relay's prep question)](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Ensure Dig and Alice are added to client Slack channels upon deal closure](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)

### Tyler's Role Expansion

  - [Tyler ready to lead all intro calls, except for Marcel's close connections](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1437.0)
  - [Will involve Marcel for big logos, crucial second calls, or complex negotiations](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1445.0)
  - [Monitor inbound form's "additional context" field for potential Marcel involvement](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle/Jason: Follow up with Ben from LightSource](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Marcel: Listen to 19-min Lovable meeting, update SOW with prompt library, prepare for tomorrow's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=671.0)
  - [George: Follow up urgently with Alloy's CMO](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Tyler: Send Positron SOW with updated pricing](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Team: Implement new pricing strategy (start at $20K/$15K)](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [George: Respond to Relay's prep question by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Tyler/George: Align on capturing and communicating Marcel's action items comprehensively](https://fathom.video/share/2WDczHtVsav3T7iJ-HDXAtajmBs8P218?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
